steps.t: Bori is waiting to speak with you concerning his plan.
Bori is waiting for you to <rgb=#FF0000>wave</rgb> so he will know that you understand the signal.
Bori is looking out into the darkness that surrounds Stazgnâkh and is waiting to speak with you.
The building for which you should run is straight ahead of Bori's position, built into the side of the rock wall. Be sure to stay away from the patrol…

Bori is waiting beneath the mine cart tracks to speak with you about the main force of the Orcs.
The platform for which you should run is straight ahead of Bori's position, built above a gap in the rock wall. Be sure to stay away from the patrolli…
The scaffolding for which you should run is straight ahead of Bori's position; he wants you to wait for him in its shadow. Be sure to stay away from t…
